extDesc.message: Authenticator generates two-factor authentication codes in your browser. (fork-authenticator)

migration_fail.message: Import failed. If you are migrating data from Google Authenticator, please re-export your data from Google Authenticator and try again.

migration_partly_fail.message: Some account data was not imported successfully.

confirm_delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This action cannot be undone.

confirm_delete_all.message: I understand that all of my data will be irrecoverably deleted.
confirm_delete_all.description: Message that user is required to acknowledge before clearing all data.

delete_all_warning.message: This will delete all of your data and completely reset Authenticator. You will not be able to recover any deleted data! You should consider saving a backup before resetting Authenticator.

security_warning.message: This password will be used to encrypt your accounts. No one can help you if you forget the password.

phrase_incorrect.message: You cannot add a new account until all accounts are decrypted. Please enter the correct password before continuing.

phrase_incorrect_export.message: Accounts that were not able to be decrypted will not be included in this backup.

ui_additional_password_required.message: Some OTP entries use another encryption password. Enter the next password to continue consolidating them.

passphrase_info.message: Enter password to decrypt account data.

clock_too_far_off.message: Caution! Your local clock is too far off, please fix it before continuing.
clock_too_far_off.description: Local Time is Too Far Off

remind_backup.message: Do you have a backup for your accounts? Don't wait until it's too late!

capture_failed.message: Capture failed, please reload the page and try again.

capture_local_file_failed.message: Are you trying to scan QR code from a local file? Use Import QR Image Backup instead.
capture_local_file_failed.description: Import QR image backup instead of scan local image

export_info.message: Warning: all backups are unencrypted. Want to add an account to another app? Hover over the top right part of any account and hit the hidden button.

import_qr_images.description: Import qr images. Shown as add account method.

import_otp_urls.description: Import OTP URLs. Shown as add account method.

import_backup_qr_partly_failed.message: Import successful, but some QR codes could not be recognized.
import_backup_qr_partly_failed.description: Import successful, but some QR image cannot be recognized.

import_backup_qr_in_batches.message: You can select multiple files to import backup in batches.
import_backup_qr_in_batches.description: You can select multiple image files to import backup in batches.

dropbox_risk.message: Warning: backups are unencrypted. Use at your own risk.

import_error_password.message: You must provide correct password to import backups.
import_error_password.description: Error password warning when import backups.

local_passphrase_warning.message: Your password is stored locally, please change it in the security menu immediately.

popout.description: Make window turn into persistent popup

webdav_section_title.description: Header text for WebDAV section on backup page

webdav_auto_backup.description: Toggle label for automatic WebDAV backups

webdav_auto_backup_desc.message: Keep a copy on your WebDAV server every 7 days when Authenticator is opened.

webdav_connection_failure.message: Failed to connect to WebDAV. Please check your credentials.

webdav_permission_denied.message: Permission denied for this WebDAV server. Please allow access when prompted.

webdav_clear_before_restore.description: Toggle label for clearing local data before restore

webdav_clear_before_restore_desc.message: Existing entries will be erased immediately before importing the selected backup.
webdav_clear_before_restore_desc.description: Description for clear before restore option

webdav_restore_parse_error.message: Unable to parse the selected backup file.

webdav_restore_passphrase_prompt.message: Enter the passphrase that was used to encrypt this backup:
webdav_restore_passphrase_prompt.description: Prompt shown when encrypted backup needs passphrase

webdav_loading_files.description: Status text while loading file list

webdav_no_files.description: Shown when WebDAV directory has no files

webdav_last_backup.description: Label for showing last backup date

webdav_never_backed_up.description: Shown when no WebDAV backup has been recorded

webdav_settings_missing.message: Please fill in your WebDAV settings first.
webdav_settings_missing.description: Shown when required settings are missing

backup_clear_confirm.message: This will delete all authenticator entries. Continue?

backup_clear_backup_prompt.message: Would you like to create a WebDAV backup first?
backup_clear_backup_prompt.description: Prompt asking the user to back up before clearing

backup_clear_success.message: All authenticator data has been removed.

storage_sync_info.message: Automatically backup your data to 3rd party storage services.

sign_in.description: Sign in to 3rd party storage services

sign_in_business.description: Sign in to 3rd party storage services

onedrive_business_perms.message: Why do business accounts require more permissions?

log_out.description: Sign out of 3rd party storage services

token_revoked.message: There was an issue connecting to your $SERVICE$ account, please sign in again.
token_revoked.description: Error authenticating to backup service. $SERVICE$ will be replaced with a proper noun (E.g.: 'Google Drive' or 'Dropbox')

otp_unsupported_warn.message: You have one or more Steam or Blizzard accounts. Unencrypted backups will not use standardized backup format.
otp_unsupported_warn.description: Warning if using account that is not supported by standard backup format.

otp_backup_inform.message: You can import backups from some other applications.

otp_backup_learn.description: learn more link on import page. Placed after otp_backup_inform

backup_file_info.message: Backup your data to a file.

password_policy_default_hint.message: Your password does not meet your organization's security requirements. Contact your administrator for more information.

advisor_insight_password_not_set.message: Set a password to protect your data.

advisor_insight_auto_lock_not_set.message: Enable auto-lock to protect your data.

advisor_insight_browser_sync_not_enabled.message: Browser sync is disabled. Enabling it allows accounts to be synced across browsers.

advisor_insight_auto_fill_not_enabled.message: Autofill can be enabled to automatically fill codes into websites.

advisor_insight_smart_filter_not_enabled.message: Enabling smart filter allows for quick access to accounts.

no_insight_available.message: No insights found, everything looks good!

no_entires.message: No accounts to display. Add your first account now.

permission_required.message: This is a required permission and cannot be revoked.

permission_active_tab.message: Access to the current tab to scan QR codes.

permission_storage.message: Access to browser storage to store account data.

permission_identity.message: Allows sign in to 3rd party storage services.

permission_scripting.message: Inject scripts into he current tab to scan QR codes and allow auto-fill to work.

permission_clipboard_write.message: Grants write-only access to the clipboard to copy codes to clipboard when you click on the account.

permission_dropbox_cannot_revoke.message: You must disable Dropbox backup first.

permission_drive_cannot_revoke.message: You must disable Google Drive backup first.

permission_onedrive_cannot_revoke.message: You must disable OneDrive backup first.

permission_unknown_permission.message: Unknown permission. If see this message, please send a bug report.

activate_auto_filter.message: Warning: Smart filter loosely matches the domain name to an account. Always verify that you are on the correct website before entering a code!

group_empty.message: This group has no entries yet.

ui_add_method_subtitle.message: Scan a QR code, enter a secret manually, or import existing data.

ui_scan_page_desc.message: Scan an OTP QR code on the current page

ui_manual_entry_desc.message: Enter a name, account, and OTP secret

ui_import_qr_desc.message: Read one or more QR codes from local images

ui_import_backup_file_desc.message: Restore OTP entries and groups from a JSON or TXT backup

ui_manual_subtitle.message: Enter the code name, account, and secret. Adjust advanced parameters when needed.

ui_secret_placeholder.message: Enter a Base32 or hexadecimal secret

ui_create_group_placeholder.message: Optional; a new group will be created automatically

ui_advisor_subtitle.message: Review current settings and get recommendations for improving data security.

ui_group_subtitle.message: Create, rename, reorder, and delete verification code groups.

ui_no_groups_desc.message: Create a group to organize verification codes by account or purpose.

ui_group_duplicate.message: A group with this name already exists.

ui_group_delete_confirm.message: Delete this group? Verification codes in it will not be deleted.

ui_preferences_subtitle.message: Adjust appearance, shortcuts, sync, and automatic locking.

ui_theme_desc.message: Choose the extension color and display style

ui_autofill_desc.message: Quickly fill verification codes on supported websites

ui_smart_filter_desc.message: Prioritize related accounts for the current website

ui_context_menu_desc.message: Open Authenticator from the webpage context menu

ui_browser_sync_desc.message: Sync data across devices using the same browser account

ui_autolock_desc.message: Require the password again after the selected idle time

ui_popout_desc.message: Open in a separate window that can stay visible

ui_security_subtitle.message: Encrypt local verification code data with a master password and control unlock protection.

ui_backup_subtitle.message: Export, import, or automatically back up your OTP data.

ui_export_backup_desc.message: Choose JSON, TXT, or CSV format

ui_import_backup_desc.message: Restore from a backup file, text, or QR code

ui_webdav_desc.message: Configure a server and manage automatic backups

ui_clear_data_desc.message: Export a backup before clearing data

ui_export_subtitle.message: Choose a file format and whether to encrypt it with the master password.

ui_no_master_password_desc.message: Only unencrypted backups can be exported. Create a master password in Security settings to enable encryption.

ui_unsupported_format.message: Some accounts do not support this format

ui_txt_csv_no_encryption.message: TXT and CSV formats do not support encryption

ui_create_password_first.message: Create a master password in Security settings first

ui_json_encryption_only.message: Only complete JSON backups support encryption

ui_json_encrypted_summary.message: Export encrypted JSON for complete backup and restore.

ui_json_summary.message: Export JSON containing OTP entries, notes, and groups.

ui_txt_summary.message: Export otpauth text for importing into other authenticators.

ui_csv_summary.message: Export CSV for viewing, filtering, and archiving in a table.

ui_unlock_before_encrypted_export.message: Unlock and confirm the master password before exporting an encrypted backup.

ui_webdav_subtitle.message: Configure a remote server, then manually or automatically back up and restore verification code data.

ui_webdav_connection_info.message: Connection details are stored only in this browser. Enter the full WebDAV directory URL.

ui_retention_desc.message: Set to 0 to keep all backups

ui_incorrect_backup_password.message: The backup password is incorrect, or the encrypted backup is damaged.

ui_advisor_desc.message: Check settings that may affect data security

ui_groups_desc.message: Create, edit, and reorder verification code groups

ui_permissions_desc.message: View and revoke optional browser permissions

ui_backup_desc.message: Import, export, or configure automatic backup

ui_security_desc.message: Set or change the data-encryption master password

ui_clock_desc.message: Correct verification code timing using network time

ui_preferences_desc.message: Adjust theme, scale, sync, and quick actions

ui_feedback_desc.message: Report an issue or suggest a feature

ui_source_desc.message: View source code and development information

ui_about_desc.message: View version, licenses, and open-source components

ui_permissions_subtitle.message: Review the browser permissions used by Authenticator and revoke optional permissions you no longer need.

ui_show_required_desc.message: Also show required permissions that cannot be revoked

ui_no_permissions_desc.message: There are no authorized optional permissions, or permission status has not loaded yet.

ui_import_file_help.message: File import supports Authenticator JSON/TXT backups and Bitwarden JSON exports.

ui_import_clear_help.message: Optionally clear existing OTP entries and groups before importing.

ui_import_qr_help.message: QR import supports common image formats such as PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, and BMP.

ui_import_text_help.message: Text import supports otpauth links, JSON backup text, and plain TXT content.

ui_import_csv_unsupported.message: CSV is currently available for export only and cannot be imported.

ui_import_result_help.message: Import progress and results are displayed on this page.

ui_settings_desc.message: Manage groups, security, backups, and extension preferences.

ui_error_passphrase_required.message: This backup is encrypted. Enter the correct backup password and try again.

ui_error_incorrect_passphrase.message: The backup password is incorrect, or the encrypted backup is damaged.

ui_error_invalid_backup.message: The content is not a supported JSON, Bitwarden, or otpauth backup.

ui_error_no_entries.message: No importable OTP entries were found.

ui_error_sync_quota.message: The import exceeds browser sync storage limits. Disable browser sync in Settings → Preferences, switch to local storage, and try again.

ui_error_local_quota.message: The import exceeds available browser storage. Reduce the import data and try again.

ui_error_read_backup.message: The backup file could not be read.

ui_error_backup_aborted.message: Reading the backup file was cancelled.

ui_error_backup_too_large.message: The backup exceeds the 100 MB import limit.

ui_error_backup_parse_timeout.message: Backup parsing timed out. Reduce the file size or try again.

ui_error_backup_worker.message: The background backup parser could not be started.

ui_error_webdav_timeout.message: The WebDAV transfer timed out. Check the connection and try again.

ui_error_too_many_qr_files.message: You can import up to 100 QR images at a time.

ui_unlock_before_group_delete.message: Unlock OTP entries before deleting a group so their group links can be updated safely.

ui_backup_password_desc.message: This WebDAV backup is encrypted. Enter its backup password to continue restoring.

ui_error_read_qr.message: The QR image could not be read.

ui_error_qr_aborted.message: Reading the QR image was cancelled.

ui_error_load_qr.message: The QR image could not be loaded.

ui_error_system_key_conflict.message: The import contains an identifier that conflicts with extension storage.

ui_error_unknown_record.message: The import contains an unrecognized storage record.

ui_error_type_conflict.message: An imported identifier conflicts with an existing OTP entry or group.

ui_error_incomplete_write.message: The imported data could not be written completely.

ui_error_batch_id_conflict.message: An imported OTP entry and group use the same identifier.

ui_error_invalid_group_id.message: The import contains an invalid or reserved group identifier.

backup_set_password_alert.message: Set a master password in Settings → Security before creating an encrypted backup.
